creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
Hi,

so I missed this release. Is this a reason that I have to pass on
maintainership of this port?
Why not just inform me via private mail?

Unfortunately I cannot test this patch right now, because I am on
vacation. Will test right after my return in 1 1/2 week. Then I'll
also check my other few ports.

@requester: apache 2.4 is missing in ports, gtk3,glib, etc. is very old...

Regards
Herbert
